findings.finding: Five-column surface layout rendered all concept cards but made individual cards too narrow on desktop.
Required static-preview and no-runtime boundary copy was present and visible near the page introduction.
Mobile layout stacked cards without horizontal overflow; boundary chips wrapped cleanly.
No forms, active buttons, runtime hooks, persistence strings, or console errors were observed on the static shell.

changes_applied: Changed the membrane surface grid to auto-fit wider concept cards instead of forcing five narrow desktop columns.
Reduced static card minimum height after widening cards to keep the page dense without fake dashboard metrics.
Strengthened the static shell validator for QA report parsing, forbidden label scans, form/button bans, runtime hook bans, and public docs registry promotion checks.
Recorded the 0.2 boundary-hardening state in the static shell record.
